page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs mapped directly to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This hardware profile is designed for compute-heavy workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 28 Gbps. The lack of local storage and the 2.0 GB per core memory ratio represent key architectural tradeoffs, prioritizing raw processing power and network throughput over local data persistence and high-density memory capacity. This makes the instance highly cost-efficient for processing-intensive tasks where local disk I/O is not the primary bottleneck.

Given its high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and 3.2 GHz clock speed, the ecs.c9i.16xlarge is suited for compute-intensive workloads. Appropriate use cases include high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, video encoding, and distributed analytics. It is also suitable for web serving and application servers that experience heavy computational loads but do not require massive memory footprints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. With 128.0 GB of RAM, the instance provides a resource ratio of 2.0 GB of memory per core, optimizing it for CPU-bound tasks. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 28 Gbps. Notably, the instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. This hardware configuration offers high compute density and dedicated processing power, making it a cost-efficient choice for workloads that do not demand high memory-to-CPU ratios or local disk storage. The ecs.c9i.16xlarge is suited for high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific simulations, and compute-heavy application servers.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 3.2 GHz, 128 GB RAM, and 28 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance processing.

tagline: A high-frequency, compute-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated processor cores and twenty-eight gigabits per second of network bandwidth.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores at 3.2 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
28 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for efficient data transfer
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached block storage
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
Suited for high-performance computing, batch processing, and scientific modeling
